summary: Project with an admin access page feature; the admin link/button is missing in production (Version 10) and needs to be fixed.
known_issues: Admin link/button is missing entirely in Version 10 production; needs to be added/fixed so the admin page is accessible from the app.

existing_features.title: Add a visible admin link/button to the site Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) so users can navigate to the /admin route from the app. The link should appear in the footer and/or the header navigation, consistent with the existing Cleanio brand design system (deep charcoal + electric orange). It should be present on all pages.
